parameters.query:
INSERT INTO health_checks (service_name, service_url, is_up, status_code, response_time, error_message, checked_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.service_name }}',
  '{{ $json.service_url }}',
  {{ $json.is_up }},
  {{ $json.status_code || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.response_time }}',
  {{ $json.error ? `'${$json.error.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.checked_at }}'
);

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS recent_failures
FROM health_checks
WHERE service_name = '{{ $json.service_name }}'
AND is_up = false
AND checked_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '20 minutes';

parameters.subject: CRITICAL: {{ $('Evaluate Health Status').item.json.service_name }} is DOWN
parameters.message:
=

Service Down Alert

Service: {{ $('Evaluate Health Status').item.json.service_name }}

URL: {{ $('Evaluate Health Status').item.json.service_url }}

Error: {{ $('Evaluate Health Status').item.json.error }}

Status Code: {{ $('Evaluate Health Status').item.json.status_code }}

Time: {{ new Date().toLocaleString('en-ZA') }}

Failures (last 20 min): {{ $('Check if Repeated Failure').item.json.recent_failures }}

Please investigate immediately.
